name: fd-search
title: fd Search
description: fd Search engine fast and accurate
author: Mujtaba1i

preferences.name: reindexAfterMinutes
preferences.title: Reindex After (Minutes)
preferences.description: Rebuild the index when opening the extension if the current index is older than this many minutes. Values are clamped between 0.5 and 20.

preferences.name: maxResults
preferences.title: Max Results
preferences.description: Maximum number of search results to display. Values are clamped between 10 and 100.

preferences.name: indexedPaths
preferences.title: Indexed Paths
preferences.description: Semicolon-separated paths to index. Default: /home. Warning: including / can take a very long time or crash indexing.

preferences.name: excludePatterns
preferences.title: Exclude Patterns
preferences.description: Semicolon-separated fd exclude patterns. Edit to remove defaults or add more exclusions.

preferences.name: includeHiddenFiles
preferences.title: Hidden Files
preferences.label: Include hidden files and folders
preferences.description: Warning: enabling hidden-file indexing can dramatically increase index size, slow indexing, or crash the extension on large systems.

preferences.name: watcherPaths
preferences.title: Watcher Paths
preferences.description: Semicolon-separated files or folders to watch for changes. If they change, opening the extension can trigger a re-index even before the normal timer. Warning: expensive on large folders.
